heading: “State” defined
label: 267 “State” defined
text: As used in this Act, the term “State” includes the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, or any possession of the United States.
notes: References in TextThis Act, referred to in text, is , , , known as the “Uniform Time Act of 1966”. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 89–38780 Stat. 107section 260 of this titleApr. 13, 1966
Amendments2000— inserted “Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands,” after “Puerto Rico,”.Pub. L. 106–564
